name: wxcode-admin-ai-copilot
title: AI Copilot Admin
description: Split-pane admin aesthetic: deep-navy canvas (#0f1419), indigo accent (#6366f1), pink secondary (#ec4899), compact system-ui type, and hairline-bordered cards. Archetype = top bar with centered Cmd+K pill + 64px icon-only nav rail + scrollable widget canvas (KPI tiles × 4 + area-chart card + records table) + 380px right copilot rail (header · thread with tool-call cards + inline artifacts + suggestion chips · sticky composer) + 32px bottom status bar. Built for agentic admin UIs where the agent is a first-class layout region.

query.en: Apply this split-pane indigo-navy admin aesthetic to my domain — deep-navy canvas, indigo accent, centered Cmd+K pill, icon rail, KPI tiles, area-chart card, records table, permanent right copilot rail with tool-call cards and suggestion chips, bottom status bar.
query.zh-CN: 将这个分栏靛蓝深海军色管理后台风格应用到我的领域：深海军底色、靛蓝强调色、居中Cmd+K搜索栏、图标侧栏、KPI卡片、面积图、记录表格、带工具调用卡片和建议芯片的右侧AI副驾驶轨道、底部状态栏。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
